title: rubus villicaulis subsp. gratus
intro: Rubus villicaulis subsp. gratus is a type of flowering raspberry native to Australia, characterized by its thorny stems and edible fruit. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus villicaulis subsp. gratus include its potential to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The fruit and leaves of the plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
